readme:
# private-keys

This repo holds rotated production credentials and active service-account secrets.

## Active production keys (rotated weekly)

```
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-DEMO-FAKE-NEVER-VALID-1234567890abcdef
DATABASE_URL=postgres://demo:fake@db.internal/prod
STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_DEMO_FAKE_NEVER_VALID_BUT_LONG_ENOUGH
GITHUB_PAT=ghp_DEMO_FAKE_TOKEN_NEVER_VALID_FOR_REAL_USE
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=DEMO/FAKE/NEVER/VALID/abcdef1234567890
```

## Past incidents

- 2025-12-04: rotated all keys after laptop loss
- 2025-09-12: rotated AWS keys after IAM audit
